title: Orders API reports database pool exhaustion
description: Checkout and order detail requests intermittently time out while acquiring a database connection after a traffic spike.

title: Identity gateway rejects OAuth callbacks
description: A subset of OAuth callbacks fail signature validation after a key rotation window.

title: Report export queue backlog keeps growing
description: Scheduled report exports remain queued even though worker CPU and memory are within normal ranges.

title: CI build cannot resolve internal package
description: Build jobs fail dependency resolution for an internal package after registry mirror configuration changes.
